title: Pouvoirs de signature du Nigeria

pages.text:
MINISTRY OF EXTERNAL AFFAIRS,

P.M.B. No. 12600,

LAGOS, NIGERIA

Telephone: 26451

Telegrams : External, Lagos

Rej. No. G8.17 6th February, 1967.

Sir,

LETTER OF AUTHORIIY

I have the honour to inform you that the Ambassador for the Federal Republlo of Nigeria in France, His Excellency

Alhaji Abdul Maliki, 1s hereby empowered with Full Powers and Authority to sign the

Protocol Modifying Article IV of the Paris

Convention: Bureau of International

Exposition on behall of the Government of the Federal Republic of Nigeria.

I also wish to take this opportunity to state that in accordance with Nigeria's constitutional procedures, signature of the Protocol is subject to ratification.

Accept, Sir, the assurances of my highest consideration.

(E./ 0.0GBU)

PERMANENT SECRETARY.

The Director-General,

Bureau of International Exposition,

Paris,

France.
